title: Science Data Segment Interface
description: System for assessing and verifying quality of Raw Data Records (RDRs), Sensor Data Records (SDRs), Environmental Data Records (EDRs), and Temperature Data Records (TDRs) through distributed Product...

definitions.definition: System for assessing and verifying quality of Raw Data Records (RDRs), Sensor Data Records (SDRs), Environmental Data Records (EDRs), and Temperature Data Records (TDRs) through distributed Product Evaluation and Test Elements (PEATEs).
